notes: Created 10 test files without active signaling. Hook configured but NOT yet active (settings watcher needs /hooks or restart). User forgot to commit entirely. RESULT: Passive reminder with delayed activation does NOT prevent forgetting.

analysis.why_it_failed: Hook reminds AFTER file write, but by the time reminder fires, attention has already shifted. No enforcement mechanism.
analysis.limitation: Reminder is passive feedback, not active enforcement. Works like a post-it note when you're already distracted.
analysis.verdict: Ineffective - needs enforcement, not just reminding
